home.badge: Real Estate Agency · Santa Perpètua de Mogoda & Vallès Occidental
home.title: Your home, our mission
home.subtitle: Mónica, Vanesa and Bego guide you through every step of buying or selling your property. Specialists in the Vallès Occidental area and surroundings.

sale.title: Buying & Selling
sale.desc: We help you find the property you are looking for or sell yours at the best price, with full transparency at every step.

personal.title: Personal & Professional
personal.desc: Mónica, Vanesa and Bego accompany you personally from the first visit to signing at the notary.

rental.title: Rentals
rental.desc: We manage the rental of your property or help you find the apartment or house you need in the area.

newBuild.title: New developments
newBuild.desc: Access to the best new development projects in the Vallès Occidental with preferential conditions.

mortgage.title: Mortgage advice
mortgage.desc: We guide you through the best financing options so your purchase is smooth and free of surprises.

docs.title: Document management
docs.desc: We handle all the paperwork: contracts, certificates, ownership transfers and notary coordination.

cta.title: Looking for something special?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what property you are looking for and our advisors will contact you within 24 hours.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: Explore our selection of properties in the Vallès Occidental
properties.noResults: No properties found matching your search.

property.contactSubtitle: Contact us and we will reply within 24h.
property.contactMessageDefault: Hi, I am interested in property {ref}. Could you give me more information?
property.contactSentSubtitle: We will get back to you within 24 hours.

property.notFoundHint: It may no longer be available.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A close, honest and committed team dedicated to finding the perfect property for you.

proximity.title: Personal touch
proximity.desc: We treat every client personally. We understand that buying or selling a home is one of the most important decisions of your life.

honesty.title: Honesty
honesty.desc: We will always tell you the truth about the market and your property, even if it is not what you expect to hear.

rigor.title: Rigour
rigor.desc: Every transaction is managed with the utmost professionalism: documentation, timelines and coordination without surprises.

communication.title: Communication
communication.desc: We keep you informed at all times. No waiting or silence: you will know exactly how your process is progressing.

cta.title: Shall we talk?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you need and we will advise you with no obligation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you are looking for and an advisor will reply within 24 hours.

form.title: Send us a message
form.subtitle: All fields are required unless otherwise indicated.

form.subject: Reason for enquiry
form.subjectBuy: I want to buy a property
form.subjectRent: I want to rent a property
form.subjectSell: I want to sell my property

whatsapp.title: Prefer WhatsApp?
whatsapp.subtitle: Message us directly and we will get back to you right away.

footer.description: Our advisors have years of experience in the real estate sector in the Vallès Occidental and surroundings. Personal, honest and professional.
